message: fix: pin anthropic sdk to patched version

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ settings:
   excludeLinksFromLockfile: false
 
 overrides:
+  '@anthropic-ai/sdk': 0.81.0
   hono: 4.12.9
   '@hono/node-server': 1.19.10
   axios: 1.13.6
